settings.title: Settings
settings.licence: Non-commercial — for the Body of Christ

step1.title: Welcome to Berean
step1.body: A free, scholar-grade Bible study platform built for pastors. Let us show you around.

step2.title: The Sidebar
step2.body: Five destinations: Study Mode, Sermon Builder, Search, Maps, and Settings.

step3.title: The Bible Pane
step3.body: Navigate chapters with Alt+← and Alt+→, or click the book name to jump anywhere.

step4.title: Verse Actions
step4.body: Hover over any verse number to bookmark, copy, or send it to your sermon clippings.

step5.title: Interlinear
step5.body: Press Ctrl+I to toggle the original Greek or Hebrew under every word, with morphology tags.

step6.title: Strong's Lookup
step6.body: Click any original-language word to see its Strong's definition, semantic domain, and all occurrences.

step7.title: Command Palette
step7.body: Press Ctrl+K to search passages, topics, people, places, and commands from anywhere.

step8.title: AI Assistant
step8.body: Press Ctrl+/ to ask the AI to explain, summarise, or translate any passage. Add your own API key in Settings for full access.

step9.title: Sermon Builder
step9.body: Build sermons with TipTap's rich editor. Drag in scripture, illustrations, and clippings from your research.

step10.title: You're Ready
step10.body: Everything runs in your browser — no account, no server, no ads. Go study the Word.
